overview: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NITC), located in Kozhikode, Kerala, is an Institute of National Importance and one of the premier technical universities in India. It is known for its rigorous academic environment, strong research culture, excellent placement record, and top-ranked programs in engineering and architecture.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC A++ Grade accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹62,500 per semester for General/OBC students with annual family income above ₹5 lakh. ₹20,833 per semester for income between ₹1 lakh and ₹5 lakh (66% tuition waiver). Full tuition waiver for SC/ST/PwD students and students with family income below ₹1 lakh.
Approximately ₹35,000 – ₹47,500 per semester depending on the program and category.

placements.totalOffers: Over 1,000 offers for the 2025 graduating batch
placements.companiesVisited: Google, Qualcomm, Texas Instruments, Goldman Sachs, Cisco, Oracle, Samsung, Deloitte, Accenture, L&T
placements.internationalOffers: Several high-value international and global offers through multinational recruiters

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level entrance examinations followed by JoSAA, CCMT, or institute-level counseling depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines follow JoSAA, CCMT, and NIT academic calendars.

campus.specialNote: Hostel charges are approximately ₹9,000 – ₹10,000 per semester. Mess charges are around ₹20,000 per semester. Total hostel and mess expenses generally range between ₹30,000 – ₹35,000 per semester.

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Calicut, NIT Campus PO, Kozhikode – 673601, Kerala, India

scholarships.details: Students from economically weaker sections receive 100% or 66% tuition fee waivers. Kerala students can apply for E-Grantz scholarships. GATE-qualified M.Tech students receive an AICTE stipend of ₹12,400 per month.
